scenes.text: A man in a red hoodie sits across from you in a dim café. His voice is calm, surgical. 'I am the Professor. I don’t steal money. I manufacture it. Printers, hostages, and time. Are you brave enough to help me?'

choices.log: He nods slowly. 'Confidence is dangerous… but useful.'
The Professor smiles. 'Smart. The exit is more important than the entrance.'
He pays off your debt. The police now know your name.

scenes.text: Inside a vast hangar, blueprints cover every wall. Red jumpsuits hang like skins of fallen soldiers. 'Every member has a city name,' the Professor says. 'Choose who you want become.'

choices.log: Welcome Rio. Firewalls become doors to you.
Welcome Valletta. Your voice can calm riots.
Welcome Bangkok. You are the wall between chaos and the crew.
Welcome Dakar. Faces become masks. Masks become power.

scenes.text: A security guard waits in an alley, cigarette shaking in his fingers. 'I can get you inside… but if they find out, I’m dead.'

choices.log: Greed defeats loyalty. Doesn't it?
Sometimes the fear of fist is necessary.
He whispers a second access route. Smart move.

scenes.text: The Royal Mint towers above you. Sirens echo far away. This is the point of no return. Either Bella Ciao or your funeral

choices.log: The guards salute you.
You smell awful, but atleast it worth the money.
Madrid hears the explosion. Drama queen.

scenes.text: Dozens of hostages kneel. Cameras broadcast your faces to the nation. Panic erupts in them, how to control it?

choices.log: Order replaces panic.
You frame it as rebellion, not robbery.
Cruelty is fast… and unforgettable.

scenes.text: The printers thunder like beasts. Money stacks higher every minute.

choices.log: The system obeys you.
Steel screams under pressure.
Trust pays interest.

scenes.text: The power cuts out. Police prepare a rooftop assault.

choices.log: Police can't see you anymore. You can escape.
You turn bullets into words.
Violence buys minutes.

scenes.text: The tunnel is ready. Sirens wail above you.

choices.log: You vanish into traffic.
Masks hide faces. Faces hide sins.
Freedom costs blood.

endings.text: 🚨 FAILURE: Surrounded and outgunned, you are arrested. The legend ends in courtrooms. It's okay partner, everybody is gonna die one die
💰 SUCCESS: You escape with millions. The Professor disappears. You become myth. BELLA CIAO!
🚁 NEUTRAL: You escape alive but poor. You needed $150M for a succesfull heist but nonetheless, survival is its own victory. Better luck next time.
